title: Paper Section Drafting: LaTeX-Ready Content Synthesis from 5 Dependency Experiments
summary: Demo notebook for the Paper Section Drafting evaluation pipeline. Loads pre-computed evaluation data from 5 dependency experiments synthesized into LaTeX paper sections. Re-computes quality metrics (word count validation, citation checking, section completeness) on 5 curated examples (abstract, results_h1, results_h5, conclusion, table_t3). Displays aggregate metrics (all 5 scores at 1.0: section completeness, numerical claim accuracy, table integrity, hypothesis mapping, internal consistency) and generates a 4-panel visualization showing word counts vs targets, aggregate metric scores, hypothesis mapping scores, and citations/references per section.
